title: SenMLSensorsResource._payload may be unset on first render
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:267-272

render_get uses getattr with a fallback to handle missing _payload:
```python
async def render_get(self, request: Message) -> Message:
    from lichen.senml.codec import pack
    payload = getattr(self, '_payload', pack([]))
    msg = Message(code=CONTENT, payload=payload)
```

While this works, it:
1. Imports pack() on every render_get call (inefficient)
2. Creates a new empty pack on every call before first update
3. Uses getattr instead of proper initialization

Same pattern in SenMLLocationResource at line 303-306.

Fix: Initialize self._payload in __init__:
```python
def __init__(self) -> None:
    super().__init__()
    self._records: list[Any] = []
    self._payload = pack([])  # or b'' for minimal response
```
